key_concerns: Acceptability of risk-benefit in earlier lines of therapy
key_positives: Addresses unmet need in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma

evidence_notes: "The Committee will have a general discussion focused on the overall survival data in the Study MMY3002 (CARTITUDE-4) and the risk and benefit [...]"
"Is the risk of early death associated with ciltacabtagene autoleucel treatment acceptable in the context of the PFS benefit?"
"The Committee will have a general discussion focused on the overall survival data in the Study MM-003 (KarMMa-3) and the risk and benefit [...]"
"Is the risk of early death associated with idecabtagene vicleucel treatment acceptable in the context of the PFS benefit?"
key_concerns: Acceptability of risk-benefit in earlier lines of therapy
key_positives: Addresses unmet need in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma
raw.questions_framing: FDA questions directly raise concerns about early death and overall survival data, framing risk-benefit discussion around these safety signals.

document.title: March 15, 2024 Meeting of the Oncologic Drugs Advisory Committee- Final Questions

signal.label: MIXED
rationale: Concerns: Risk of early death; Uncertain overall survival benefit; Acceptability of risk-benefit in earlier lines of therapy
Positives: Significant PFS benefit; Addresses unmet need in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma
